issues.offending_span: The company lifted its full-year guidance on strong business momentum
issues.explanation: This claim about guidance being lifted is not contained in cited chunks C031 or C032. C031 covers the Shop Small Grants Program announcement, and C032 covers the KBW Conference presentation transcript. The guidance lift information appears in previously verified facts from other chunks but is not supported by the specifically cited evidence.
issues.recommended_fix: Either cite the appropriate chunk(s) that contain the guidance lift information, or remove this claim if it cannot be properly sourced to the cited evidence.

issues.offending_span: elevated valuation following strong stock performance

Neither chunk contains stock price data, valuation metrics, or performance information. This information appears in previously verified facts from other chunks but is not supported by the specifically cited evidence.
issues.recommended_fix: Cite the appropriate chunk(s) containing stock performance data (likely from the Recent Developments or Business & Competitive Analysis sections), or remove this claim from the paragraph.
